children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type, read from CSV/JSON/API, parse into records, write to raw_data, and append log entry to pipeline_log

data_operations.description: Write parsed records to raw_data store
Append log entry for ingestion step

constraints.description: Must handle source read errors gracefully without crashing pipeline

acceptance_criteria.description: All records from source are parsed and stored in raw_data
pipeline_log contains an entry for the ingestion step with timestamp and record count

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, skip malformed records, store in processed_data, and log transformation
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule to each record, skip records that cause errors, write valid transformed records to processed_data, append log entry
children.signature: def TransformData(transform_config: dict, raw_data: list) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read raw records from raw_data store
Write transformed records to processed_data store
Append log entry for transformation step

constraints.description: Malformed records must be skipped and logged without failing the entire transformation

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid records from raw_data are transformed and stored in processed_data
Malformed records are skipped and their count is included in the log entry

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, compute quality_score, and log validation
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, assign quality_score, mark invalid records (e.g., set a 'valid' flag), append log entry

global_vars.description: Read and update processed_data with quality flags and scores

data_operations.description: Read processed_data, update records with quality_score and valid flag
Append log entry for validation step

constraints.description: All records must receive a quality_score even if invalid

acceptance_criteria.description: Every record in processed_data has a quality_score and a valid flag
pipeline_log contains an entry for the validation step with record counts and quality summary

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output in requested format, log export, and return final result
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter to only records that passed validation, format as CSV or JSON, append log entry, return pipeline_result with data
children.signature: def ExportData(export_format: str, processed_data: list) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read processed_data to filter valid records for export
Append log entry for export step

constraints.description: Only records with valid flag set to true should be included in the output

acceptance_criteria.description: Output contains only records that passed validation
Output format matches the requested export_format (csv or json)
pipeline_log contains an entry for the export step with record count

governance_notes: Each child's global_vars are a subset of the parent's global_vars (raw_data, processed_data, pipeline_log). Data operations respect the read/write/read_write permissions defined in the parent. No new data stores are introduced. Resource allocation is limited to the three parent stores.
